evidence.snippet: We provide excellent quality RADOMs for satellite communication antennas and terminals based on your needs. We design, develop and produce sandwich radomes that are the ideal solution for shipboard and fixed-site tactical SATCOM applications and can function across various SATCOM bands.

items.notes: Radomes are composite/dielectric structural enclosures (fiberglass, carbon fiber, Kevlar) protecting radar/antenna systems on air, land, and sea platforms.

evidence.snippet:
### Satcom Radomes
We provide excellent quality RADOMs for satellite communication antennas and terminals based on your needs. We design, develop and produce sandwich radomes that are the ideal solution for shipboard and fixed-site tactical SATCOM applications and can function across various SATCOM bands.

items.name: TT&C Radomes
items.product_type: radome for Telemetry Tracking & Command subsystems

evidence.snippet:
### TT&C Radomes
We produce RADOMs for Telemetry Tracking & Command subsystems to be used at satellites and spacecrafts. We reduce your maintenance and repair costs by ensuring that your TT&C systems are protected from the corrosive effects of external factors and can operate effectively under all weather conditions.

### Air Traffic Control Radomes
We meet the radom needs of airports, leading radar manufacturers and civil aviation authorities all around the world. With our high quality radomes which have durability against 240-300 km/h wind speed at least, we enable precise measurements with the reliability required by aerospace applications.

evidence.snippet:
###### Custom Radome
Custom radomes are designed to meet specific customer requirements, including size, shape, and material composition. Custom radomes are used in a wide range of applications, including military and civilian aviation, weather monitoring, and communication systems. Custom radomes are essential for enabling new technologies and applications, and are often designed to meet unique and challenging requirements.
